personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior Back-End Engineer | Symfony 7 & Node.js Expert
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Senior Backend Architect specialized in high-performance PHP (Symfony 7) and Node.js ecosystems. Expert in designing secure multi-tenant SaaS architectures, implementing Domain-Driven Design (DDD), and orchestrating complex fintech integrations (Stripe Connect). Proven track record in database optimization (PostgreSQL/Redis) and building resilient AI failover systems for mission-critical applications.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Free access to the EU job market.

experience.title: Senior Back End Engineer
responsibilities: Symfony 7 Migration: Led the architectural redesign of a legacy backend to Symfony 7, implementing a modular monolith with event-driven synchronization.
AI Infrastructure: Engineered a Composite AI Service Layer in Node.js/TypeScript orchestrating Gemini, Groq, and Cerebras, maintaining 99.9% uptime through custom failover logic.
Database Performance: Architected high-throughput data layers for ZIRO.FIT using `LATERAL JOINs` and materialized views, reducing DB load by 80%.
Security & Compliance: Designed secure multi-tenant architectures with field-level encryption (AES-256-GCM), managing sensitive financial data for thousands of users.

experience.title: Independent Back-End Developer
responsibilities: Lexity MVP Backend: Architected resilient API with automated LLM failover, multi-layer Redis caching, and AES-256-GCM encryption for user data.
Interly APIs: Built Node.js/TypeScript backend with Gemini integration for real-time oral response evaluation.
Migrations & Optimization: PHP/Laravel refactoring contracts for European clients, SQL optimization and cache pattern implementation.

experience.title: Back End Developer (Apprenticeship)
responsibilities: PHP/Symfony Development: Contributed to web application development in agile teams, learning architectural patterns and industry best practices.
Database: Complex SQL queries, optimization with Doctrine ORM, understanding of performance considerations.

experience.title: Lead Back End Developer
responsibilities: Symfony Expert: Architected mission-critical APIs using Symfony 6/7 and API Platform, enforcing Clean Architecture and SOLID principles across all backend services.
Asynchronous Processing: Implemented robust background job systems using Symfony Messenger and Redis, handling thousands of concurrent webhooks with zero message loss.
Fintech Integration: Developed advanced Stripe Connect workflows for multi-party payouts, including automated KYC verification and complex commission routing.
Performance Tuning: Optimized PHP FPM and PostgreSQL configurations, resulting in a 30% reduction in API response times and significant infrastructure cost savings.

projects.name: Core-API: Symfony 7 Multi-tenant Framework
projects.description: A high-performance boilerplate for multi-tenant SaaS applications built with Symfony 7, featuring JWT authentication, automated tenancy switching, and API Platform integration.
projects.stack: Symfony 7, API Platform, PostgreSQL, Docker, Redis

projects.name: Lexity: AI Failover Backend
projects.description: Resilient backend featuring automated failovers between 3 LLM providers, Redis caching, and server-side encryption for user privacy.

projects.name: ZIRO.FIT: Fintech & Marketplace Engine
projects.description: Architected a dual-sided marketplace routing complex Stripe Connect payouts, utilizing advanced SQL to collapse N+1 queries into single payloads.
projects.stack: Next.js APIs, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Stripe Connect

education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
